rules: STRICT GROUNDING: generated plans may contain ONLY lines copied verbatim from plans[].w/.d/.cd (equivalently: catalogue entries). Never invent, paraphrase, or extrapolate drills, techniques, warmups, or coaching notes.
If a request cannot be satisfied (class type x topic x theme has no material), say so explicitly and list what IS available. Never fill gaps.
Every emitted line carries a source reference: catalogue id + source plan file.
Rank/belt targeting unsupported (archive has no belt metadata); redirect to class type + topic.
'Usual warmup' is emitted literally; it is intentionally undefined.

style_dna.curricula: topics rotate weekly; Karate 1-12, Muay Thai 1-8 (see topics)
style_dna.warmup: adults: 'Usual warmup' standard; kids: games (pizza game, shoulder tap, knee tap)
style_dna.tech_structure: format-header blocks: Lines -> Partners/pads (Thai pads, Round bags) -> Freestyle; progression single technique -> combo -> movement/angles -> timing -> freestyle; ~10 lines ~= 60 min
style_dna.terminology: teep, turning kick (not roundhouse), snapkick, leg checks, skip knees, up elbow, trap and roll, shrimping; combos as comma lists
